regime_fall.current_status: Following a 40-day US military campaign (Operation Epic Fury) that destroyed 80% of Iran's nuclear infrastructure, a fragile ceasefire took hold on April 9-10, 2026. The IRGC has consolidated de facto control post-Khamenei, but diplomatic negotiations over the Strait of Hormuz, Lebanon ceasefire terms, and nuclear ambitions remain deadlocked, with significant risks of ceasefire breakdown.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Operation Epic Fury concluded on April 9, 2026, with US forces completing a 38-day campaign that struck over 13,000 targets, destroyed approximately 80% of Iran's nuclear industrial base, and resulted in a ceasefire agreement amid ongoing diplomatic stalemate over core regional disputes.
